title: Weekly Pulse: GLOBAL MACRO STRATEGY
excerpt: Extreme fear drives VIX up 13.16% as massive tech distribution meets hawkish central bank posture. Cross-border capital reallocation accelerates amid regulatory friction.

title: Weekly Pulse: GLOBAL MACRO STRATEGY
excerpt: Systemic liquidation triggers extreme fear paradigm. VIX backwardation forces CTA deleveraging across mega-cap tech. Central banks execute targeted liquidity interventions amid escalating geopolitical fragmentation and shadow-banking credit stress.
